title: place-items
description: Shorthand for align-items and justify-items on a grid container. Setting place-items: center is the most concise way to center a child both horizontally and vertically.
html:
Perfectly centered

Both axes, one property
challenge: The card is stuck in the top-left corner. Center it both horizontally and vertically using a single CSS property on the container.

alternatives.name: Flexbox centering
alternatives.description: Flexbox requires two properties to achieve the same result. Use this when you already have a flex container and switching to grid would be disruptive.

realWorldUsage: The go-to pattern for full-screen hero sections, loading spinners, empty-state illustrations, and modal backdrops — anywhere a single element needs to sit in the center of its container at any size.
